name: flow-05-branch-b-ml-adaptation
description: Branch B: T89 CurriculumAdapter. Three-guard ML validation: count ceiling, protected required modules, recency guard. Time-decoupled from Branch A.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T89 three guards, LearningPlanSkipped as success, timeout in successModes
Retrieve ML output validation pattern for FLOW-05 Branch B
Break into: recency check → ML suggest → filter (count ceiling + protected modules) → apply → emit LearningPlanAdapted or LearningPlanSkipped
Generate curriculum-adapter.service.ts (T89). Three guards applied in order: recency → count ceiling → protected modules. LearningPlanSkipped = success.
Named check: config_over_hardcode (maxChanges from FREEDOM), store_before_enqueue, tenant_id_on_writes
Score against iron rules: three guards complete, LearningPlanSkipped as success
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
